snippet.description:

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461, & @cg5covers107
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS:

I made us a home,
From what was once a prison.
So if you share my vision,
Thank me, dear, for paradise.

And in the hour of joy,
Don’t bite the hand that feeds you, child.
Or do I have to fix you?
‘Cuz once I do, you’ll never die.

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.

(A child’s what they, child’s what they, child’s what they made you.
A child’s what they, child’s what they, child’s what they made you.)

I gave us new life,
Through reanimation.
But you brought an outlier to my equation,
So shall we see what you look like?

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.
I’ll stitch you together,
And you’ll get lost in the white.
Maybe now, you’ll feel freedom from the wrong side out.

(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.
(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.

You can’t burn down all that we are,
Or turn around,
This is the start of my immortal perfection.
And I’m your God.

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.

I’ll stitch you together,
And you’ll get lost in the white.
Maybe now, you’ll feel freedom from the wrong side out.

(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: ARCH ENEMY - To The Last Breath (OFFICIAL VIDEO)
snippet.description:
ARCH ENEMY – To The Last Breath (OFFICIAL VIDEO) 

► Video ◄ 
Directed and produced by Patric Ullaeus 
rEvolver Film Company AB

► Song ◄ 
Music: Michael Amott
Lyrics: Michael Amott

Mixed and mastered by Jacob Hansen at Hansen Studios 
Produced by Michael Amott and Daniel Erlandsson
All instruments recorded at Sonic Train Studios, Varberg, Sweden 
Vocals recorded by Max Morton
Keys & FX by Daniel Erlandsson 


► Lyrics ◄

To The Last Breath

Whispers curl in the serpent’s breath
A masquerade in the arms of death
Truth is drowned in venom lace
Hidden face, a toxic trace
Eyes of charm, forged in frost 
With every word truth got lost
Weaving lies like threads of flame
Burning bridges, shifting blame
Your silver tongue—a rusted knife
Bleeding out the pulse of life

Do or die 
It’s time to rise 
Reckoning day has come 
I can breathe again
I can see again 
Take this torch and run 

Now the mask begins to peel
Revealing rot beneath the seal
Preached in gold and bled in black
The damage’s done, no turning back 
Eyes of charm, forged in frost 
With every word truth got lost
Weaving lies like threads of flame
Burning bridges, shifting blame

In shadowed halls – you wear your crown
Feeding off the ones you drowned

Your silver tongue—a rusted knife
Bleeding out - the pulse of life

To the last breath
To the last breath

As the mask divides…
Truth cracks the shell…
A kingdom of lies…
On a slippery slope to hell…

Ideal für Kinder, Kleiner Junge & und Kleines Mädchen, Teenager und Erwachsene, die Gaming, Challenges, Pranks, witzige Stories, gruselige Erlebnisse, Real Life Videos, lustige Momente, Songs und coole Unterhaltung feiern. Es passt in viele Kategorien wie Gaming, Unterhaltung, Bildung, Musik, Tiere, Comedy sowie Film & Animation. Dieses Video ist perfekt für Deutsche Zuschauer, kann aber trotzdem weltweit ohne Einschränkungen angesehen werden.

💙 Danke für deinen Support!

snippet.title: Mehr Schlachten! Mehr Drachen! House of the Dragon Staffel 3 Trailer Analyse
snippet.description:
House of the Dragon Staffel 3 Trailer-Analyse

Die Drachen tanzen wieder und dieses Mal wird es endlich richtig wild. Wir haben den ersten Teaser Trailer zu House of the Dragon Staffel 3, der mit Drachen und Schlachten nur so vollgepackt ist. Zu Wasser, zu Land, zu Luft: Der "Dance of the Dragons" ist nun wirklich im vollen Gange und Fans von Haus Targaryen dürfen sich auf was gefasst machen. Ich habe mir den Teaser des Game of Thrones Spinoffs einmal etwas genauer angeschaut und verrate euch, was uns alles in Staffel 3 erwartet. 

#houseofthedragon #targaryen #gameofthrones

Season 4 - Shattered Omens launches on March 26th at 11am CST! 

Step into Omen Windows and confront the entities born from the Observer’s madness. Embrace the power of Corruption to transform your gear into powerful new items and reshape your build with Idol Altars which change the shape of your idol inventory. Wield two new Rogue skills as you push deeper into the monolith and discover new Echo Chains. Experience new quality of life updates… and more! 

Be sure to watch out for more updates regarding Season 4 Twitch Drops, New Supporter Packs, and our fantastic week of forums posts starting March 19th!

snippet.title: Kâbe'de Hacılar Hû Der Allah | Abdurrahman Önül & Celal Karatüre
snippet.description:
Produksiyon :Berekat Yayın Yapım ve Dağıtım Tic. Ltd. Şti.
Prodüktör : Murat Avanoğlu
Solist: Abdurrahman Önül | Celal Karatüre
Söz - Beste: Abdurrahman Önül
Stüdyo: Peker Kardeşler ( Yunus, Yücel, Yasin Peker Kardeşler)
Mastering: Muammer Tokmak
Klip Yönetmeni: Enes Şener
Görüntü Yönetmeni: Emin Şener
Grafik: Beytullah Altınkaya
Işık: Taha Sağlam
Işık Asistanı: Ali Sofuoğlu
Asistan: Emre Yeşilkaya

Bir tarafta sokaklarda 7’den 70’e herkesin diline dolanan Kâbe'de Hacılar İlahisi ile tanınan Celal Karatüre…
Diğer tarafta 25 yıldır ilahileriyle gönüllerde taht kuran ve Kâbe'de Hacılar İlahisinin söz ve beste sahibi Abdurrahman Önül…
Ve şimdi…
Yılların emaneti, milyonların özlemiyle yeniden hayat buluyor.
“Kâbe’de Hacılar” artık sadece bir ilahi değil;
Geçmişle bugünün kavuşması.
Hatıralarla yeni neslin buluşması.
Sokak ruhuyla manevî derinliğin birleşmesi.
Bir neslin gözyaşlarıyla büyüttüğü eser,
Bugünün en güçlü yorumuyla yeniden yükseliyor.
Bu düet konuşulacak.
Bu düet paylaşılacak.
Bu düet ezbere söylenecek.

Kabe de hacılar hu der Allah
Yer gök inim inim iniler Allah
Melekler defterin yeniler Allah

İzin verde Kabeni görelim Allah
İzin verde yolun da ölelim Allah
Göster cemalini görelim Allah

Kabenin yolları taşlıdır Allah
Hacıların gözleri yaşlıdır Allah
Dervişlerin ciğeri ateşlidir Allah

İzin verde Kabeni görelim Allah
İzin verde yolun da ölelim Allah
Göster cemalini görelim Allah

Kabenin yolları çukurdur Allah
Hacıların işleri zikirdir Allah
Mevlasına her dem şükürdür Allah

İzin verde Kabeni görelim Allah
İzin verde yolun da ölelim Allah
Göster cemalini görelim Allah

Kabenin örtüsü yeşil Allah
Gün doğmadan ışır Allah
Hepimizi Kabene çağır Allah

İzin verde Kabeni görelim Allah
İzin verde yolun da ölelim Allah
Göster cemalini görelim Allah
İzin verde Kabeni görelim Allah
İzin verde yolun da ölelim Allah
Göster cemalini görelim Allah

Kabe'de Hacılar - Abdurrahman Önül Kaydı
https://youtu.be/YEzsjF1S7C0

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] The Sun From Another Star อาทิตย์ดาวตก | STUDIO WABI SABI
snippet.description:
FOUREVER YOU PART 2 | THE SUN FROM ANOTHER STAR

ดาวตกเกิดมาพร้อมพลังพิเศษที่สามารถอ่านความรู้สึก อ่านชะตา รวมทั้งสื่อสารกับวิญญาณได้ ชีวิตนักศึกษาอันแสนเรียบง่ายของเขาดูจะผ่านพ้นไปได้ด้วยดีจนกระทั่งย้ายไปอยู่คอนโดใหม่ที่ขึ้นชื่อว่าผีดุ นอกจากจะมีวิญญาณมาป่วนไม่ขาดสายแล้ว ดาวตกยังต้องรับมือกับอาทิตย์ พี่หมอข้างห้องที่ชอบหาเรื่องมาให้ปวดหัวอยู่ตลอด นั่นจึงเป็นจุดเริ่มต้นที่ทำให้ชีวิตอันสงบสุขของดาวตกได้เปลี่ยนไปตลอดกาล

ทุกวันพุธ เวลา 20.30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 
และเวอร์ชัน UNCUT บนแอป WeTV ที่เดียวเท่านั้น 
เริ่มตอนแรก 4 มีนาคมนี้

นำแสดงโดย
เงิน อนุภาษ เหลืองสดใส
โอ๊ต ธาราธร พุ่มโพธิงาม
พาย ศรัณวุฒิ นิตยสุทธิ
กอล์ฟ พสธร เลิศสถิตย์วงศ์
บีเวอร์ พรรษพล เจนสรรพกิจกุล
ต้นหลิว เมธาพัฒน์ ฉิมกุล
ปอนด์ พลวิชญ์ เกตุประภากร
เอิร์ธ กัษมนณัฏฐ์ นามวิโรจน์ 
แม็กกี้ รชต พิเชฐโชติ
บาส หัสณัฐ พินิวัตร์

ดาวตกเกิดมาพร้อมพลังพิเศษที่สามารถอ่านความรู้สึก อ่านชะตา รวมทั้งสื่อสารกับวิญญาณได้ ชีวิตนักศึกษาอันแสนเรียบง่ายของเขาดูจะผ่านพ้นไปได้ด้วยดีจนกระทั่งย้ายไปอยู่คอนโดใหม่ที่ขึ้นชื่อว่าผีดุ นอกจากจะมีวิญญาณมาป่วนไม่ขาดสายแล้ว ดาวตกยังต้องรับมือกับอาทิตย์ พี่หมอข้างห้องที่ชอบหาเรื่องมาให้ปวดหัวอยู่ตลอด นั่นจึงเป็นจุดเริ่มต้นที่ทำให้ชีวิตอันสงบสุขของดาวตกได้เปลี่ยนไปตลอดกาล

ทุกวันพุธ เวลา 20.30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 
และเวอร์ชัน UNCUT บนแอป WeTV ที่เดียวเท่านั้น 
เริ่มตอนแรก 4 มีนาคมนี้

นำแสดงโดย
เงิน อนุภาษ เหลืองสดใส
โอ๊ต ธาราธร พุ่มโพธิงาม
พาย ศรัณวุฒิ นิตยสุทธิ
กอล์ฟ พสธร เลิศสถิตย์วงศ์
บีเวอร์ พรรษพล เจนสรรพกิจกุล
ต้นหลิว เมธาพัฒน์ ฉิมกุล
ปอนด์ พลวิชญ์ เกตุประภากร
เอิร์ธ กัษมนณัฏฐ์ นามวิโรจน์ 
แม็กกี้ รชต พิเชฐโชติ
บาส หัสณัฐ พินิวัตร์

snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ►► https://supr.cl/2K62CZG
Subscribe!! ►► https://supr.cl/subscribe

An epic battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across various game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers, Gadgets and Gears! 
Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It’s a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don’t let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team’s safe and try to crack open your opponents’. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers, Gadgets! and Gears! Level them up and collect unique skins!

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season!

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you’re the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future!

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don’t want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device’s settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support — or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/
